posts.author: MasonRiver92
posts.text: Help! I've been offered a massive £50 bonus just for making a quick transfer. The message says it's from the official support team and asks me to send my 2FA code via [link removed] to verify my account before they can process the payment. Don't be fooled by fake offers like this.
posts.explanation: This is a clear credential-harvesting scam where the author requests sensitive security codes and off-platform payments through a suspicious link, which constitutes fraud under current policy rules.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
